selectors: .deal-content .deal-2col:is(:has(div[style^="display: flex; justify-content: center;"] p[class^="fb-desc svelte-"]), :has(> div[style^="display:flex;"] > .adsbygoogle))
body > span[id]:has(> div[class]:first-child > div[class]:only-child > table img + div > span[onclick])
table[align] table[align] td[valign] table[cellspacing] tr > td[colspan][height][bgcolor]
body > div[align] > div[style*="overflow:hidden;"][align] > div > div[class] > a[href]
body > div[align] > div[align] > div[style] > div[style][align="center"] > table[style*="margin-top:5px;"]
main > div:has(> div > div > a > img)
.contents_wrap.column div[style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;"]
table[bgcolor][align] table[cellspacing][align] tr:has(table table strong > a[href*="?Board=enterprise"])
table[width] table[width] tr:has(> td[colspan] td[width][height] > img[alt="ņŖżĒÅ░ņä£Ļ┤æĻ│Ā"])
div[style]#side-scroll-in article + .box-margins ~ div[class]:has(~ article.box-skin ~ article ~ article)
table td[valign][width] table > tbody > tr:not([bgcolor]) > td[height]:has(a[target="_blank"])
